title: Wynncraft: Fables & Legends
description: Gives unique skins to higher tier Weapons from Wynncraft
body:
---
### This project will not receive any more content updates
This project has been succeeded by [Wynnic Fables & Legends -2-](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynn-fl2), which has much higher quality models, and is actively being updated.


---

Hi Hi!

In my years of playing [Wynncraft](https://wynncraft.com), I have stumbled across almost every single Fabled and Legendary weapon in the game. But despite their incredible stats or otherwise, and their handful of unique abilities, they all seem fairly...mundane. To make discovering these weapons, and using them, a bit more exciting, I present...

### The Wynncraft Fables & Legends Resource Pack


The pack is well on its way to give every single Fabled and Legendary weapon its own custom 3D model, akin to the recent cosmetics added to Wynncraft through its festivals. It is also overhauls Mythics, and a handful of Unique and Rare weapons too!

---

### Versions

The pack requires mods to function. 

The more recent updates of the pack have split it into two versions: CITR and OF. CITR stands for [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions), and OF stands for [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads), each intended for their respective mod. Optifine can be ran as a standalone or with [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/), but CITR requires [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/). The pack is intended to work with Minecraft versions 1.17-1.20.2, but could possibly work with earlier versions.

Please note that if the pack says it is incompatible with your current Minecraft version, if you have the required mods and are on 1.17-1.20, the pack will still work.

---

### Policies

This pack is not to be redistributed on any third-party sites.
If you would like to share the pack, use:

[https://forums.wynncraft.com/threads/wynncraft-fables-legends-resource-pack.310225/]

&

[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynncraft-fables-legends]

Assets in this pack are under no conditions allowed to be repurposed for other projects. The only conditions in which you may use these assets outside of the designated pack are:
- If your project is for strictly personal and/or private use only, and will not be redistributed, or
- If you have explicit permission from me, Rythew

To contact me, please find me on Discord with the handle: `rythew`

I am not officially associated with Wynncraft, and I am not staff nor paid by Wynncraft.

---

### Closing Notes

Please see the Gallery for a handful of my personal favourites. This pack is intended to be used for the Wynncraft server only. I hope that you like it, and if you would like to request other weapons (which can also be Unique, Rare, and Set tiers), leave a comment on the Wynncraft Forums, or DM me on Discord.

---
